movie.actors: Tami Erin, David Seaman, Cory Crow, Eileen Brennan
movie.plot: After her father's ship is carried off by a sudden storm, the spunky Pippi Longstocking is stranded with her horse, Alfonso, and monkey, Mr. Nilsson, and takes up residence in the old ...
movie.title: The New Adventures of Pippi Longstocking
